title: Deliciously Smoky Algerian Lamb Kebabs
description: Fatty and bouncy Algerian lamb kebabs featuring lime juice, perfect for a brunch mood, made with ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients and cooked on a yakimono grill.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to medium high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together lime juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Thread the marinated lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Let the kebabs rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with fresh herbs and lime wedges.
